title: migrate claude models to aws bedrock + rename to version-based names
author: ElliotEtag

gist.headline: A new bed for Claude
gist.blurb: We've tucked our Claude models into AWS Bedrock and gave them shiny new version-based names. Your old aliases still work, but now you can be specific about which flavor of Claude you want.
gist.summary: Migrated Claude models to AWS Bedrock and updated the model registry to use explicit version names.
gist.impact: Developers can now target specific Claude versions like `claude-sonnet-4.6`, while existing apps using legacy names remain fully supported via aliases.
gist.visual_concept: Claude (AI model) moving to Bedrock (AWS). Visual metaphor: a cozy bed made of smooth stones. The bee mascot is organizing blocks with numbers on them (versions) next to the bed.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot organizing small wooden blocks with numbers on them next to a tiny, cozy bed made of smooth stones. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot organizing small wooden blocks with numbers on them next to a tiny, cozy bed made of smooth stones.
